loading.title: Loading Invitation...
loading.description: Please wait while we retrieve your invitation details.

submitting.title: Submitting Your Response...
submitting.description: Please wait while we process your response.

errors.loadFailed: Failed to load invitation. Please try again later.
errors.alreadyResponded: You have already responded to this invitation.
errors.submitFailed: Failed to submit your response. Please try again.

responseButtons.title: How would you like to respond?
responseButtons.declineReasonPlaceholder: Let us know why you cannot participate...
responseButtons.questionsPlaceholder: Let us know what information you need...
responseButtons.hint: Accepting will show additional options for your preferences.

preferencesForm.title: Your Preferences
preferencesForm.description: Help us plan the perfect event by sharing your preferences. All fields are optional.

technical.label: Technical Requirements
technical.remoteOptionDesc: Ability to present remotely if needed

presentationTitle.label: Proposed Presentation Title
presentationTitle.placeholder: Enter a working title for your presentation...

comments.label: Additional Comments
comments.placeholder: Any other information or requests for the organizer...

accepted.title: Thank You for Accepting!
accepted.description: We look forward to having you speak at the event.

declined.title: Response Received
declined.description: We appreciate you letting us know.

tentative.title: Thank You for Your Response
tentative.description: The organizer will reach out with more information.

nextSteps.title: What's Next?
nextSteps.accepted1: The organizer will contact you with scheduling details.
nextSteps.accepted2: You'll receive confirmation of your time slot.
nextSteps.accepted3: Closer to the event, we'll send presentation guidelines.
nextSteps.tentative1: The organizer will reach out with additional information.
nextSteps.tentative2: Feel free to contact us if you have questions.
nextSteps.declined: We hope to invite you to future events. Thank you for your time.

alreadyResponded.title: Already Responded
alreadyResponded.description: You have already responded to this invitation.

expired.title: Invitation Expired
expired.description: This invitation is no longer available.
expired.message: The deadline for responding to this invitation has passed. Please contact the organizer if you would still like to participate.

error.title: Something Went Wrong
error.tip1: Check if you clicked the correct link from your email
error.tip2: Invitation links expire - you may need to contact the organizer
error.tip4: Contact support if the problem persists
